title: Qodly WebForm
description: JSON schema for .WebForm files used by Qodly Studio / 4D. Derived from 169 real-world pages across 7 applications.

v.description: Schema version. Always "1.0" in current Qodly.

datasources.description: Page-level data source declarations that components bind to.

id.description: Unique name used to reference this datasource in component bindings.

namespace.description: Scope namespace. Empty string = page-local. 'shared'/'Shared' = cross-page. Custom names for module scoping.

dataclass.description: ORDA DataClass name (for entity/entitysel types). E.g. 'Employee', 'Event'.

from.description: Parent datasource ID. For entity derived from an entity selection (e.g. currentElement).

initialValue.description: Initial value. Varies by type: '' for empty, 'all' for full selection, 'first' for first entity, or a literal value.

depth.description: Relation expand depth for entity/entitysel. null = default.

pageSize.description: Page size for entity selection lazy loading.

events.description: Events attached to this datasource (e.g. onChange triggers a method).

name.description: CSS class name. Applied to components via classNames array.

content.description: Raw CSS. Use 'self' as selector for the target element. Supports @media queries, pseudo-selectors (:hover, :active), and descendant selectors.

parentId.description: Parent style ID for inheritance. null = top-level.

ComponentMap.description: Flat map of componentId → Component. Always contains a 'ROOT' key. IDs are nanoid-style strings (e.g. 'ZEhfp3f0p9').

isCanvas.description: true = container that accepts child nodes (drag target in Qodly Studio). false = leaf component.

displayName.description: Human-readable label shown in Qodly Studio outline.

custom.description: Custom metadata, i18n translations, and layout hints. Usually empty {} when no i18n is used.

__t.description: Translation metadata template. Structure depends on component type.

doc.description: For Text components: either an empty array (no i18n) or an array containing a metadata object with nested children referencing i18n keys. When i18n is active, each entry has: { children: [null, { children: [{ text: { key: '<i18n_key>', default: '<default_text>' } }] }] }.

text.description: For Button components: an object with 'key' (i18n key from i18n.json) and 'default' (fallback text). Example: { key: 'sso_connect', default: 'Connect with SSO' }.

key.description: i18n translation key (must exist in i18n.json).

default.description: Default/fallback text when no translation is found.

^[a-zA-Z\\-]+$.description: Per-language empty doc placeholder inside __t. Key is the language code (e.g. 'en', 'fr', 'es-ES'). Value is { doc: [] }.

contentHeight.description: Internal layout hint (e.g. for SelectBox containers).

^i18n:[a-zA-Z\\-]+$.description: Per-language translation override. Key format: 'i18n:<lang>' (e.g. 'i18n:en', 'i18n:fr', 'i18n:es-ES'). For Text components: { doc: [DocParagraph] }. For Button components: { text: '<translated string>' }.

doc.description: Translated rich text paragraphs for Text components.

text.description: Translated plain text for Button components.

parent.description: Parent component ID. Empty string '' for ROOT only.

hidden.description: Whether the component is hidden in Qodly Studio outline.

nodes.description: Ordered list of direct child component IDs (children placed inside this canvas).

linkedNodes.description: Named slot → component ID map. Used by compound components (e.g. TextInput has 'label' and 'input' slots, Button has 'icon', Dialog has 'Dialog' and 'close', Tabs/Accordion have dynamic slot keys).

ComponentProps.description: Component properties. Shape varies by resolvedName. All share common fields; component-specific fields are documented below.

events.description: Event handlers attached to this component.

style.description: Inline CSS properties as camelCase key-value pairs. Values are typically strings but may be numbers.

classNames.description: CSS class names from the page styles or shared styles.

className.description: Utility class string (Tailwind-style). Used mainly on ROOT Container and some internal components.

datasource.description: Data binding path. Formats: 'dsName' (direct), 'dsName.attribute' (attribute), 'namespace:dsName' (cross-scope), '$This.attribute' (inside Matrix/SelectBox iteration).

serverSideRef.description: Server-side reference ID. Used to target this component from server functions (e.g. for CSS manipulation, visibility control).

iterableChild.description: Marks component as a repeated child inside Matrix/SelectBox.

airyMode.description: ROOT Container property. Enables spacing mode for top-level layout.

text.description: Text content for Button, Label, FileUpload.

doc.description: Rich text document model for Text component. Array of paragraph blocks.

type.description: Component-specific type qualifier. For Input: text, password, number, date, etc. For Calendar: full. For Checkbox: two-state. Custom types also possible.

dataType.description: Data type hint for Input binding.

format.description: Display format string (e.g. 'Date short', '0', custom format).

readOnly.description: Read-only flag (alternate casing used by some components like MonthPicker).

deletable.description: Whether this sub-component can be deleted in the editor.

moveable.description: Whether this sub-component can be moved in the editor.

icon.description: FontAwesome icon class for Icon component (e.g. 'fa-star', 'fa-solid fa-check').

webform.description: WebformLoader: name of the .WebForm page to embed.

orientation.description: Layout direction for Matrix, chart orientation, etc. Values: vertical, horizontal, x, y, Horizontal.

currentElement.description: Matrix/SelectBox/DataTable: datasource name for the current iteration entity.

headerHeight.description: DataTable header row height in px.

rowHeight.description: DataTable body row height in px.

variant.description: Visual variant for Tabs ('line', 'enclosed', etc.) or Accordion ('default', etc.).

multiple.description: Accordion: allow multiple panels open simultaneously.

openChevron.description: Accordion icon when panel is open.

closeChevron.description: Accordion icon when panel is closed.

template.description: SelectBox display template. Supports {{ length }} placeholder.

role.description: Semantic role for sub-components (accordion-header, accordion-content, tab, item1, item2, etc.).

Event.description: Event handler. Three types: 'method' (calls exposed 4D function), 'simple-action' (client-side datasource operation), 'navigation' (page transition).

events.description: Trigger names that fire this handler.

items.description: Event trigger name (onclick, onload, oninit, onchange, onChange, onselect, onopen, onclose, onmouseenter, onmouseleave, onloaded, onclickaction, etc.).

disabled.description: Disable this event handler without removing it.

MethodEvent.description: Calls an exposed 4D class function via REST.

dataclass.description: Target dataclass or 'DataStore' for datastore-level functions.

method.description: Fully qualified method path. Formats: 'ds.functionName' (DataStore), 'ds.DataClass.functionName' (DataClass), 'entityDatasource.functionName' (entity-level). Can also use namespace:datasource.function for shared entity selections.

namespace.description: Namespace of the datasource the method is called on (for shared datasources).

datasource.description: Datasource context (usually empty for dataclass methods).

returns.description: Return value mapping — routes the function result back into a datasource.

name.description: Parameter name matching the 4D function signature.

type.description: Parameter type. Matches 4D types: string, number, boolean, date, object, variant, or ORDA class types (cs.EntityName, cs.EntityNameEntity, cs.EntityNameSelection).

datasource.description: Datasource path to read the value from. Empty if hardcoded.

isHardCoded.description: true = use hardCodedValue instead of datasource.

hardCodedValue.description: Literal value when isHardCoded is true.

type.description: Return type. Can be 4D types, ORDA class types (cs.EntityEntity, cs.EntitySelection), 'Variable', 'collection', 'object', etc.

datasource.description: Datasource to populate with the return value. Supports namespace prefix (e.g. 'shared:datasourceName', 'Shared:datasourceName').

SimpleActionEvent.description: Client-side datasource manipulation without server call.

action.description: Action verb: copy, refresh, set, create, delete, add, reset, clear, all, save, orderBy, remove, empty, query, logout, clean, click, previous, next, hover, first. Can also be empty string.

actionType.description: Qualifier for the action target (datasource, auth, state).

loader.description: WebformLoader component ID to load the target page into. Empty = full page navigation.

parent.description: Navigation context. 'same-tab' = current tab, 'webform-loader-self' = enclosing WebformLoader.

isHardCoded.description: true = target is a static page name.

DocParagraph.description: Rich text paragraph in the Text component's document model.

DocInline.description: Inline text or datasource span inside a paragraph.

type.description: Span type. 'datasource' for dynamic data binding, 'link' for hyperlinks, 'i18n' for translated text.

dsType.description: Data type of the bound datasource (string, number, date, boolean, duration, long, bool, or empty).

format.description: Display format for the datasource value.

__i18n.description: i18n translation key (references a key in i18n.json). Used when type is 'i18n'.

__baseValue.description: Base/default text value before translation. Used when type is 'i18n'.

id.description: Unique identifier for the inline span (numeric timestamp). Used with i18n spans.

children.description: Nested inline spans (used inside datasource or i18n spans as display template).

DataTableColumn.description: Column definition for the DataTable component.

source.description: Entity attribute path for this column's data.

width.description: Column width (CSS value, e.g. '30%', '200px', or number in px).

dataType.description: Data type of the column values.

TabDef.description: Tab definition for the Tabs component.

initialSsRef.description: Server-side reference for initial tab content.

id.description: Unique tab ID (nanoid). Also used as linkedNodes key.

AccordionItem.description: Panel definition for the Accordion component.

initialSsRef.description: Server-side reference for accordion panel content.

id.description: Unique panel ID (nanoid). Used to generate linkedNodes keys.
